summary: Weekly Digest Browser View - All features verified working. Backend: 10/11 tests passed (1 error due to rate limiting). Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Digest page fully verified: 1) GET /api/admin/weekly-digest/snapshot returns all required fields: ok, week_start, week_end, generated_at, kpis (revenue, orders, customers, new_affiliates, active_partners_pct, critical_alerts), revenue_breakdown (category, revenue, pct), operations (pending_payments, overdue_followups, stale_leads, unassigned_tasks), sales (top_reps, lowest_rep, stuck_deals, total_reps), ecosystem (total_partners, active_partners, inactive_partners, regions_without_coverage, categories_without_partners, pending_applications), affiliates (total, active), alerts (severity, message, cta, cta_label), actions (label, path). 2) Page renders at /admin/weekly-digest with data-testid='weekly-digest-page'. 3) Header shows 'Weekly Operations Report' with week range and generated timestamp. 4) 6 KPI cards: Revenue, Orders, Customers, Affiliates, Partner Util %, Alerts - with color-coded borders (red for critical alerts). 5) Revenue Breakdown section shows category table with Revenue and Share columns, plus Highlights sidebar. 6) Operations Health shows 4 cards: Pending Payments, Overdue Follow-Ups, Stale Leads, Unassigned Tasks - green for healthy (0), amber for warning (>0). 7) Sales Performance shows top 3 reps with podium numbers (1,2,3) and revenue, plus insights (Needs Attention for 0 deals, Stuck Deals for overdue follow-ups). 8) Partner Ecosystem shows active partners, inactive count, region/category gaps, pending applications. 9) Affiliate Performance shows Total and Active counts. 10) Alerts Summary shows alerts with severity badges (critical/warning/info) and CTA buttons that navigate correctly. 11) Action Items show actionable deep links with 'Open' buttons that navigate to relevant pages. 12) 'Weekly Digest' sidebar entry visible under 'Reports & Analytics' section.

details: KPIs include: revenue, orders, customers, new_affiliates, active_partners_pct, critical_alerts
revenue_breakdown is array with category, revenue, pct fields
operations includes: pending_payments, overdue_followups, stale_leads, unassigned_tasks
sales includes: top_reps (max 3), lowest_rep, stuck_deals, total_reps
ecosystem includes: total_partners, active_partners, inactive_partners, regions_without_coverage, categories_without_partners, pending_applications
alerts is array (max 3) with severity, message, cta, cta_label
actions is array with label, path fields
Table with Category, Revenue, Share columns
Highlights sidebar shows top category insight
4 cards: Pending Payments (0, green), Overdue Follow-Ups (28, amber), Stale Leads (0, green), Unassigned Tasks (0, green)
Top 3 performers with podium numbers: Brian Kweka #1 (TZS 1,637,840), Janeth Msuya #2 (TZS 1,608,865), Neema Mallya #3 (TZS 616,460)
Insights: 'Needs Attention' for Staff Sales User (0 deals), 'Stuck Deals' (28 deals with overdue follow-ups)
Critical alert: '28 overdue follow-ups need attention' with 'View Alerts' CTA
Info alert: '5 affiliate applications pending review' with 'Review Applications' CTA
CTA buttons navigate correctly to /admin/team/alerts and /admin/affiliate-applications
'Weekly Digest' entry visible under 'Reports & Analytics' section
